title: Impossible Travel Sign-ins
description: Detects successful sign-ins from distant locations within unrealistic time windows.
query:
SigninLogs
| where TimeGenerated > ago(7d)
| where ResultType == "0"
| extend Lat = todouble(LocationDetails.geoCoordinates.latitude)
| extend Lon = todouble(LocationDetails.geoCoordinates.longitude)
| where isnotempty(Lat) and isnotempty(Lon)
| order by UserPrincipalName, TimeGenerated
| serialize
| extend PrevLat = prev(Lat), PrevLon = prev(Lon), PrevTime = prev(TimeGenerated), PrevUser = prev(UserPrincipalName)
| where UserPrincipalName == PrevUser and isnotempty(PrevLat)
| extend TimeDiff = datetime_diff('minute', TimeGenerated, PrevTime)
| where TimeDiff > 0
| extend Distance_km = geo_distance_2points(Lon, Lat, PrevLon, PrevLat) / 1000
| extend Speed_kmh = Distance_km / TimeDiff * 60
| where Speed_kmh > 800 and Distance_km > 500
| project TimeGenerated, UserPrincipalName, Distance_km = round(Distance_km, 0), Speed_kmh = round(Speed_kmh, 0), TimeDiff, IPAddress
| order by Speed_kmh desc
